Role Status Pages

Role Status Pages

Two-view website mirrors for each role: Profile for friendly personnel context and Artifacts for source files, automations, inventory gaps, gates, and source maps. These pages never grant authority.

View rolesBack to org chart

Published Role Pages

Generated from role-artifacts.md and Tess's Autonomy Evaluation 0.1.50.

Ana / Recruiter

MindShare

Operator

Level 4 Senior Staff (Scoped Autonomy); Level 5 policy defined-not-active; Level 6 deferred

Operator

Recruiting Pipeline Packet Standing

From Tess's Autonomy Evaluation 0.1.50. These are unassigned Level 2 Trainee packets, not activated operators. Finn / REC-010 is excluded because Finn is activated separately as Finance Director.

REC-001 / Operations Director

Mindshare

Chief Operating Officer

Level 2 Trainee packet; not activated, no office, runtime, channels, handoff/memory writes, state-changing authority, external communication, production, Git/release, spending, secrets, or authority expansion.

REC-002 / Product Director

Mindshare

Chief Product Officer

Level 2 Trainee packet; not activated, no office, runtime, channels, handoff/memory writes, state-changing authority, external communication, production, Git/release, spending, secrets, or authority expansion.

Mindshare
